---
title: "ICR² Accepted to ACL 2025 Findings"
description: "Our paper on Eliciting In-context Retrieval and Reasoning for Long-context LLMs has been accepted into ACL 2025 Findings."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-06-10"
categories: [AI, LLMs, RAG, retrieval, NLP, research, conference, paper]
image: cover.png
---

![Apple Machine Learning Research. ([Source](https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/eliciting-in-context))](cover.png){fig-align="center"}

Happy to announce our paper *Eliciting In-context Retrieval and Reasoning for Long-context Large Language Models* by Yifu Qiu, Varun Embar, Yizhe Zhang, Navdeep Jaitly, Shay Cohen, Benjamin Han is accepted into ACL 2025 Findings [[1]](#ref-1)! We have also updated the paper on arXiv to include additional results on LLaMA-3-Instruct-8B.

Unfortunately I won't be in Vienna for the conference due to work, but if you are going, make sure to attend Yifu and Varun's presentation!

This is a follow-up to the [original ICR² preprint announcement](../20250115-icr2-preprint-announcement/) from January. See also a [follow-on observation about embedding-based retrieval limits](../20250831-embedding-retrieval-limits/) where ICR² is referenced as a way out.

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Qiu, Yifu, Varun Embar, Yizhe Zhang, Navdeep Jaitly, Shay Cohen, and Benjamin Han. "Eliciting In-context Retrieval and Reasoning for Long-context Large Language Models." *arXiv*, 2025. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.08248> · *Apple Machine Learning Research:* <https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/eliciting-in-context> · *Repo:* <https://github.com/apple/ml-icr2>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_llms-nlp-nlproc-activity-7338418905209573379-d3Mi).*
